name: Buffalo Chicken Wings with Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Disjoint chicken wings and discard the tips.
2. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Add hot pepper sauce and remove from heat.
3. Heat vegetable oil to 375°F (190°C) in a large frying pan or deep-fat fryer.
4. Fry wings in batches without crowding until golden brown, about 10 to 15 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
5. Brush wings with spicy butter and serve warm with Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce.
To make the sauce:
1. In a small bowl, mash blue cheese, leaving some lumps.
2. Whisk in mayonnaise until blended.
3. Add remaining ingredients and whisk to blend well.
4. Cover and refrigerate until time to serve.
